docs.title: The Pullman strike: the story of a unique experiment and of a great labor upheaval
docs.creator: Lindsey, Almont
docs.description: Comprehensive narrative of the 1894 Pullman Strike and its national consequences for U.S. labor law.

docs.title: Voices of Labor: Pullman Strike retrospective (1949 broadcast)
docs.creator: American Federation of Labor
docs.description: 55th anniversary radio retrospective featuring oral histories from surviving participants.

docs.title: The great strike on the Chicago, Burlington & Quincy
docs.creator: Hogan, Charles M.
docs.description: Contemporary account of the 1894 strike from a railroad-management perspective.
